title: Codectx Configuration
description: Schema for codectx.yml. Validates the project-level configuration that declares documentation package dependencies, activation state, and build settings. This file is the sole source of truth for a project's documentation setup.

docs_dir.description: Documentation source directory, relative to the repository root.

output_dir.description: Compiled documentation output directory, relative to the repository root.

packageDependency.description: A documentation package dependency with version constraint and activation state.

source.description: Git repository URL. Optional. Inferred from name and author when omitted.

active.description: Activation state. Controls which parts of the package are included in the compiled output. Defaults to 'none' when omitted.

oneOf.description: 'all' activates every entry in the package. 'none' installs the package but activates nothing.

activationMap.description: Granular activation by section. Each field lists the IDs to activate from that section. Omitted sections default to no activation.

foundation.description: IDs of foundation entries to activate from this package.

topics.description: IDs of topic entries to activate from this package.

prompts.description: IDs of prompt entries to activate from this package.

plans.description: IDs of plan entries to activate from this package.
